---
layout: "none"
sitemap: false
---
# Set-OutlookSignatures: Global Technical Knowledge Base (Full)
# Generated on: {{ site.time | date_to_xmlschema }}

{%- comment -%} 
  1. We combine pages and all collections. 
  In Polyglot, this array contains the 'master' list before the final language filter.
{%- endcomment -%}
{%- assign all_items = site.pages | concat: site.documents -%}

{%- for node in all_items -%}
  {%- comment -%} 
    Filter: 
    1. Must have a title (excludes CSS/Assets)
    2. Skip 404s and Redirects
    3. We DO NOT check 'site.active_lang' here because we want EVERYTHING.
  {%- endcomment -%}
  {%- unless node.redirect_to or node.sitemap == false or node.url contains '/assets/' or node.url contains '/404' or node.title == nil -%}

    {%- comment -%} 
      Fixing the Language Detection:
      Polyglot assigns 'lang' to the node. If nil, it's the default language.
    {%- endcomment -%}
    {%- assign node_lang = node.lang | default: site.default_lang -%}

    {%- comment -%} 
      Building the URL based on your sitemap logic.
    {%- endcomment -%}
    {%- if node_lang == site.default_lang -%}
      {%- assign final_url = node.url | absolute_url -%}
    {%- else -%}
      {%- assign final_url = '/' | append: node_lang | append: node.url | absolute_url -%}
    {%- endif -%}

    {%- assign final_url = final_url | replace: "//", "/" | replace: "http:/", "http://" | replace: "https:/", "https://" | replace: "/index.html", "/" -%}

## ENTITY: {{ node.title }}
**Language:** {{ node_lang | upcase }}
**URL:** {{ final_url }}
{% if node.subtitle %}**Subtitle:** {{ node.subtitle }}{% endif %}
{% if node.description %}**Description:** {{ node.description }}{% endif %}
{% if node.date %}**Published:** {{ node.date | date: "%Y-%m-%d" }}{% endif %}

### CONTENT:
{{ node.content | strip_html | normalize_whitespace }}

---
  {%- endunless -%}
{%- endfor -%}
